title: Core Campaign System
description: A reference-dependent campaign system: one anchor asset establishes hierarchy and visual language, then three rollout variants preserve the same brand or narrative logic across surfaces.
creative_direction: Image 01 defines the core hierarchy, narrative entry point, and premium campaign finish. Images 02-04 must preserve the same system while adapting to tighter composition, rollout context, and mood shift without losing recognizability. Theme dimension: 多设备 mockup + 滚动叙事 + 转化区.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01-anchor-visual first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for the remaining series images. Queue may run the dependent images concurrently after the anchor is done.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Core Campaign System
en.description: A reference-dependent campaign system: one anchor asset establishes hierarchy and visual language, then three rollout variants preserve the same brand or narrative logic across surfaces.

zh-CN.title: 核心宣发系统
zh-CN.description: 先用一张主视觉建立层级和视觉语言,再做三张延展资产,在不同媒介表面上保持同一宣发逻辑。
